category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn or garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Cameroon, including chargers, external power supplies, and battery packs.

title.en: China-to-Cameroon Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Cameroon market-access requirements: ANOR national standards adopting IEC 62841, PECAE conformity and import inspection, ART radio approval for cordless tools, French-language documentation, electrical safety, EMC, noise, restricted substances, and battery handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与喀麦隆市场准入要求差距对照：ANOR 采用 IEC 62841 的国家标准、PECAE 符合性与进口检验、无绳工具的 ART 无线电批准、法语文件、电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声、限用物质及电池处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與喀麥隆市場准入要求差距對照：ANOR 採用 IEC 62841 的國家標準、PECAE 符合性與進口檢驗、無繩工具的 ART 無線電批准、法語文件、電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲、限用物質及電池處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Cameroon law, ANOR national standards, PECAE conformity and import-inspection requirements, ART radio rules, French-language documentation obligations, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行喀麦隆法律、ANOR 国家标准、PECAE 符合性与进口检验要求、ART 无线电规则、法语文件义务及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆法律、ANOR 國家標準、PECAE 符合性與進口檢驗要求、ART 無線電規則、法語文件義務及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Cameroon, the practical baseline is conformity to ANOR national standards (NC) that adopt IEC 62841, evidenced through the PECAE conformity and import-inspection programme, with French-language documentation; cordless tools with radio functions may additionally need ART approval. There is no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking regime, so noise should be handled honestly as a design and IEC test-method consideration rather than a Cameroon product-marking law.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入喀麦隆，实务基线是符合 ANOR 采用 IEC 62841 的国家标准（NC），通过 PECAE 符合性与进口检验程序证明，并提供法语文件；带无线电功能的无绳工具可能还需要 ART 批准。喀麦隆没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声应作为设计与 IEC 测试方法的考量诚实处理，而非作为喀麦隆产品标识法律。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入喀麥隆，實務基線是符合 ANOR 採用 IEC 62841 的國家標準（NC），通過 PECAE 符合性與進口檢驗程序證明，並提供法語文件；帶無線電功能的無繩工具可能還需要 ART 批准。喀麥隆沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲應作為設計與 IEC 測試方法的考量誠實處理，而非作為喀麥隆產品標識法律。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change of Cameroon ANOR, PECAE, or ART requirements
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
